relationships: ber:Zemreɣ ad iliɣ din ɣef tizi n tis snat d kramraw
ber:Ad zemreɣ ad iliɣ din ɣef tizi n tis snat d kramraw
ber:A win yufan, Tom ad yili da ɣef tizi n tis snat d kramraw
ber:Bɣiɣ ad ifak umahil-a seg-a ɣef tis snat d kramraw
ber:Bɣiɣ amahil-a ad ifak seg-a ɣef tis snat d kramraw
ber:Asakal yekkat azal n kramraw n tmikin akken ad yaweḍ ɣer din
ber:Attan qrib d tis snat d kramraw
ber:Zemreɣ ad d-qqleɣ ɣef tizi n tis snat d kramraw
